title.ko: 정적 저장 (반도체 메모리 소자 H10B)
title.en: STATIC STORES (semiconductor memory devices H10B)

definition.ko: 정보의 써넣기 또는 판독하기 G11C7/00 어드레스(ADDRESS)의 선택 G11C8/00 소자의 형식에 따라 특징이 지워지는 디지털 기억 전기적 자기적인 형식들; 그 세부 G11C11/00; 5/00 기계적인 형식들 G11C23/00 유체적인 형식들 G11C25/00 그 밖의 형식들 G11C13/00 백업(BACK-UP) 수단에 의해 특징 지워지는 디지털 기억 G11C14/00 EPROM G11C16/00 정보의 전위에 따라서 특징지워지는 디지털 기억 시프트(SHIFT); 순환 G11C19/00, G11C21/00 기능에 따라서 특징지워지는 기억 연상기억; 아날로그(ANALOG); 판독하기 전용 G11C15/00; 27/00; 17/00 기억의 체크(CHECK) 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 G11C99/00

title.ko: 그룹 G11C11/00로 분류되는 저장장치의 세부
title.en: Details of stores covered by group G11C0011000000
Disposition of storage elements, e.g. in the form of a matrix array
Supports for storage elements; Mounting or fixing of storage elements on such supports
Supporting of cores in matrix
Arrangements for interconnecting storage elements electrically, e.g. by wiring
for interconnecting magnetic elements, e.g. toroidal cores
for interconnecting capacitors
Apparatus or processes for interconnecting storage elements, e.g. for threading magnetic cores
Power supply arrangements

title.ko: 디지털 기억장치에 정보를 써넣거나 또는 디지털 기억장치로부터 정보를 판독하는 장치(5/00이 우선; 11/407, 11/413 트랜지스터를 사용하는 정보기억)
title.en: Arrangements for writing information into, or reading information out from, a digital store (G11C0005000000 takes precedence;auxiliary circuits for stores using semiconductor devices G11C0011406300, G11C0011413000, G11C0011419300)
with means for avoiding parasitic signals
with means for avoiding disturbances due to temperature effects
Sense amplifiers; Associated circuits
Control thereof
Input/output [I/O] data interface arrangements, e.g. I/O data control circuits, I/O data buffers
Bit line control circuits, e.g. drivers, boosters, pull-up circuits, pull-down circuits, precharging circuits, equalising circuits, for bit lines
Dummy cell management; Sense reference voltage generators

title.ko: 아날로그/디지털[A/D] 변환기, 디지털 메모리 및 디지털/아날로그[A/D] 변환기로 구성된 장치를 이용한 디지털 기억장치에 아날로그 신호 저장
title.en: Storage of analogue signals in digital stores using an arrangement comprising analogue/digital [A/D] converters, digital memories and digital/analogue [D/A] converters
Bit line organisation; Bit line lay-out
Memory cell initialisation circuits, e.g. when powering up or down, memory clear, latent image memory
Read-write [R-W] timing or clocking circuits; Read-write [R-W] control signal generators or management
Memory cell safety or protection circuits, e.g. arrangements for preventing inadvertent reading or writing; Status cells; Test cells

title.ko: 디지털 기억장치에 있어서 어드레스(address)를 선택 하는 장치(반도체 소자를 이용하는 저장을 위한 보조 회로 11/4063, 11/413, 11/4193)
title.en: Arrangements for selecting an address in a digital store (auxiliary circuits for stores using semiconductor devices G11C0011406300, G11C0011413000, G11C0011419300)
using selecting matrix
using a sequential addressing device, e.g. shift register, counter
Address interface arrangements, e.g. address buffers
Word line control circuits, e.g. drivers, boosters, pull-up circuits, pull-down circuits, precharging circuits, for word lines
Decoders
Group selection circuits, e.g. for memory block selection, chip selection, array selection
Word line organisation; Word line lay-out
Multiple access memory array, e.g. addressing one storage element via at least two independent addressing line groups
Address timing or clocking circuits; Address control signal generation or management, e.g. for row address strobe [RAS] or column address strobe [CAS] signals
Address safety or protection circuits, i.e. arrangements for preventing unauthorized or accidental access

title.ko: 특정의 전기적 또는 자기적 기억소자의 사용에 따라 특징지워지는 디지털 기억장치; 그를 위한 기억소자(14/00 ～ 21/00이 우선)
title.en: Digital stores characterised by the use of particular electric or magnetic storage elements; Storage elements therefor (G11C0014000000-G11C0021000000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 그룹 G11C11/56은 그룹 G11C11/02 ~ G11C11/54에 우선함

title.ko: 자기적 소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using magnetic elements

title.ko: 실린더(cylinder)상의 기억소자, 예. 로드(rod), 와이어(wire)를 사용하는 것(11/12, 11/14이 우선)
title.en: using storage elements having cylindrical form, e.g. rod, wire (G11C0011120000, G11C0011140000 take precedence)

title.ko: 단공(single-aperature)기억소자를 사용하는 것, 예. 링(ring) 자심; 다공판을 사용하여 각각의 구멍(aperture)이 하나의 기억소자를 구성하는 것
title.en: using single-aperture storage elements, e.g. ring core; using multi-aperture plates in which each individual aperture forms a storage element

title.ko: 1비트당 1소자를 기억하거나 파괴판독을 행하기 위한 단순한 구멍 또는 자기루프를 지니는 소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using elements with single aperture or magnetic loop for storage, one element per bit, and for destructive read-out

title.ko: 2L/2D 조직 또는 3차원 [3D] 조직과 같은 비트 단위 조직, 즉. 읽기와 쓰기에 있어서, 적어도 두 개의 일치된, 부분 전류에 의해 하나의 기억소자를 선택하기 위하여 조직화된 것
title.en: bit-organised, such as 2L/2D-organisation or three-dimensional [3D]-organisation, i.e. for selection of an element by means of at least two coincident partial currents both for reading and for writing

title.ko: 2차원 [2D] 조직 또는 선형 선택과 같은 워드 단위조직, 즉. 단일 전체 판독전류에 의한 전기억소자를 선택하기 위하여 조직화된 것
title.en: word-organised, such as two-dimensional [2D]-organisation, or linear selection, i.e. for selection of all the elements of a word by means of a single full current for reading
using elements with single aperture or magnetic loop for storage, one element per bit, and for non-destructive read-out

title.ko: 다공기억소자를 지니는 것, 예. 트랜스플럭스 (transfluxors)를 사용하는 것; 복수개의 독립된 다공기억소자를 판상체를 사용하여 구성하는 것(11/10가 우선)
title.en: using multi-aperture storage elements, e.g. using transfluxors; using plates incorporating several individual multi-aperture storage elements (G11C0011100000 takes precedence)
using multi-axial storage elements
using tensors; using twistors, i.e. elements in which one axis of magnetisation is twisted

title.ko: 박막소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using thin-film elements

title.ko: 다층의 자성층을 사용하는 것(11/155가 우선)
title.en: using multiple magnetic layers (G11C0011155000 takes precedence)
with cylindrical configuration
using elements in which the storage effect is based on magnetic spin effect
using Hall-effect devices
using non-linear reactive devices in resonant circuits
using parametrons

title.ko: 전기적 소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using electric elements
using ferroelectric elements

title.ko: 하나의 공통층상의 정전기억을 사용하는 것, 예. 포레스터하에프(Forrester-Haeff) (11/22가 우선)
title.en: using electrostatic storage on a common layer, e.g. Forrester-Haeff tubes (G11C0011220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 축전기를 사용하는 것(11/22가 우선; 반도체장치와 축전기의 결합을 사용하는 것(11/34, 예. 11/40)
title.en: using capacitors (G11C0011220000 takes precedence;using a combination of semiconductor devices and capacitors G11C0011340000, e.g. G11C0011400000)

title.ko: 방전관을 사용하는 것
title.en: using discharge tubes
using gas-filled tubes

title.ko: 진공관을 사용하는 것(11/23이 우선)
title.en: using vacuum tubes (G11C0011230000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 반도체장치를 사용하는 것
title.en: using semiconductor devices
with charge storage in a depletion layer, e.g. charge coupled devices
using diodes, e.g. as threshold elements
using tunnel diodes
using thyristors

title.ko: 트랜지스터를 사용하는 것
title.en: using transistors

title.ko: 재충전(refreshing)이나 또는 전하 재발생을 필요로 하는 셀(cells)를 형성하는 것, 예. 다이나믹 셀
title.en: forming cells needing refreshing or charge regeneration, i.e. dynamic cells
with charge regeneration individual to each memory cell, i.e. internal refresh
with charge regeneration common to a multiplicity of memory cells, i.e. external refresh
with one charge-transfer gate, e.g. MOS transistor, per cell
with three charge-transfer gates, e.g. MOS transistors, per cell
Management or control of the refreshing or charge-regeneration cycles

title.ko: 보조회로들, 예. 어드레싱, 디코딩, 드라이빙, 쓰기, 센싱이나 타이밍을 위한 것
title.en: Auxiliary circuits, e.g. for addressing, decoding, driving, writing, sensing or timing
for memory cells of the bipolar type

title.ko: 전계효과형의 메모리 셀을 위한 것
title.en: for memory cells of the field-effect type
Circuits for initialization, powering up or down, clearing memory or presetting
Power supply or voltage generation circuits, e.g. bias voltage generators, substrate voltage generators, back-up power, power control circuits

title.ko: 타이밍 회로(재발생 관리를 위한 11/406)
title.en: Timing circuits (for regeneration management G11C0011406000)

title.ko: 안전 또는 보호 회로, 예. 불의의 읽기 또는 쓰기를 방지하기 위한 것; 상태 셀; 시험 셀(체크 또는 테스트 도중 메모리 내용의 보호 29/52)
title.en: Safety or protection circuits, e.g. for preventing inadvertent or unauthorised reading or writing; Status cells; Test cells (protection of memory contents during checking or testing G11C0029520000)
Address circuits
Read-write [R-W] circuits
Sense or sense/refresh amplifiers, or associated sense circuitry, e.g. for coupled bit-line precharging, equalising or isolating
Input/output [I/O] data interface arrangements, e.g. data buffers
Bit-line management or control circuits
Input/output [I/O] data management or control circuits, e.g. reading or writing circuits, I/O drivers or bit-line switches
Bit-line organisation, e.g. bit-line layout, folded bit lines
Dummy cell treatment; Reference voltage generators
forming cells with positive feedback, i.e. cells not needing refreshing or charge regeneration, e.g. bistable multivibrator or Schmitt trigger
using bipolar transistors only
using field-effect transistors only
Auxiliary circuits, e.g. for addressing, decoding, driving, writing, sensing, timing or power reduction
for memory cells of the bipolar type
Address circuits
Read-write [R-W] circuits
for memory cells of the field-effect type
Address circuits
Read-write [R-W] circuits

title.ko: 특별한 형태의 반도체 저장 소자에 특정된 보조 회로들, 예. 어드레싱, 드라이빙, 센싱, 타이밍, 전력공급, 신호 전송을 위한 것(11/4063, 11/413이 우선)
title.en: Auxiliary circuits specific to particular types of semiconductor storage devices, e.g. for addressing, driving, sensing, timing, power supply, signal propagation (G11C0011406300, G11C0011413000 take precedence)
Address circuits
Read-write [R-W] circuits
using opto-electronic devices, i.e. light-emitting and photoelectric devices electrically- or optically-coupled
using super-conductive elements, e.g. cryotron
using thermoplastic elements
using displaceable coupling elements, e.g. ferromagnetic cores, to produce change between different states of mutual or self-inductance
using actuation of electric contacts to store the information
using electromagnetic relays
using elements simulating biological cells, e.g. neuron
using storage elements with more than two stable states represented by steps, e.g. of voltage, current, phase, frequency

title.ko: 11/00, 23/00 또는 25/00에 속하지 않는 기억소자의 사용에 의해 특징지워지는 디지털 기억장치
title.en: Digital stores characterised by the use of storage elements not covered by groups G11C0011000000, G11C0023000000, or G11C0025000000
using elements whose operation depends upon chemical change
using optical elements
using magneto-optical elements
Digital stores characterised by arrangements of cells having volatile and non-volatile storage properties for back-up when the power is down

Digital stores in which information comprising one or more characteristic parts is written into the store and in which information is read-out by searching for one or more of these characteristic parts, i.e. associative or content-addressed stores
using magnetic elements
using semiconductor elements
using cryogenic elements

title.ko: 소거가능한 프로그램할 수 있는 읽기 전용메모리 (14/00이 우선)
title.en: Erasable programmable read-only memories (G11C0014000000 takes precedence)
electrically programmable
using variable threshold transistors, e.g. FAMOS
Auxiliary circuits, e.g. for writing into memory
Address circuits; Decoders; Word-line control circuits
Programming or data input circuits
Programming voltage switching circuits
Circuits for erasing electrically, e.g. erase voltage switching circuits
for erasing blocks, e.g. arrays, words, groups
Circuits for erasing optically
Initialising; Data preset; Chip identification
Safety or protection circuits preventing unauthorised or accidental access to memory cells
Bit-line control circuits
Sensing or reading circuits; Data output circuits
using differential sensing or reference cells, e.g. dummy cells
Power supply circuits
Timing circuits
Determination of programming status, e.g. threshold voltage, overprogramming or underprogramming, retention

title.ko: 한번만 프로그램할 수 있는 읽기전용 메모리; 반영구적 저장, 예. 손으로 리플레이스(replace) 할 수 있는 정보 카드
title.en: Read-only memories programmable only once; Semi-permanent stores, e.g. manually-replaceable information cards

title.ko: 자기 또는 유도소자를 사용하는 것(17/14가 우선)
title.en: using magnetic or inductive elements (G11C0017140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 용량(capacitive) 소자를 사용하는 것(17/06, 17/14가 우선)
title.en: using capacitive elements (G11C0017060000, G11C0017140000 take precedence)

title.ko: 다이오드소자를 사용하는 것(17/14가 우선)
title.en: using diode elements (G11C0017140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 반도체장치를 사용하는 것, 예. 쌍극소자(17/06, 17/14가 우선)
title.en: using semiconductor devices, e.g. bipolar elements (G11C0017060000, G11C0017140000 take precedence)
in which contents are determined during manufacturing by a predetermined arrangement of coupling elements, e.g. mask-programmable ROM
using field-effect devices
in which contents are determined by selectively establishing, breaking or modifying connecting links by permanently altering the state of coupling elements, e.g. PROM
using electrically-fusible links
Auxiliary circuits, e.g. for writing into memory

title.ko: 정보가 스텝(step) 형식으로 이동하는 디지털 기억장치, 예. 쉬프트 레지스터(shift register)
title.en: Digital stores in which the information is moved stepwise, e.g. shift registers

title.ko: 자기소자를 사용하는 것(19/14가 우선)
title.en: using magnetic elements (G11C0019140000 takes precedence)
using cores with one aperture or magnetic loop
using structures with a number of apertures or magnetic loops, e.g. transfluxors
using thin films in plane structure
using thin films on rods; with twistors
using non-linear reactive devices in resonant circuits

title.ko: 능동소자와 조합하여 자기소자를 사용하는 것, 예. 방전관, 반도체소자(19/34가 우선)
title.en: using magnetic elements in combination with active elements, e.g. discharge tubes, semiconductor elements (G11C0019340000 takes precedence)
using capacitors as main elements of the stages

title.ko: 방전관을 사용하는 것(19/14가 우선)
title.en: using discharge tubes (G11C0019140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 반도체소자를 사용하는 것(19/14가 우선)
title.en: using semiconductor elements (G11C0019140000, G11C0019360000 take precedence)
using opto-electronic devices, i.e. light-emitting and photoelectric devices electrically- or optically-coupled
using super-conductive elements
using storage elements with more than two stable states represented by steps, e.g. of voltage, current, phase, frequency
using semiconductor elements
two-dimensional [2D], e.g. horizontal and vertical shift registers

title.ko: 정보가 순환하는 형식의 디지털 기억장치(스텝형식인 것 19/00)
title.en: Digital stores in which the information circulates (stepwise G11C0019000000)
using electromechanical delay lines, e.g. using a mercury tank
Digital stores characterised by movement of mechanical parts to effect storage, e.g. using balls; Storage elements therefor
Digital stores characterised by the use of flowing media; Storage elements therefor

title.ko: 전기적 아날로그 기억장치, 예. 순시치를 기억하기 위한 것
title.en: Electric analogue stores, e.g. for storing instantaneous values

title.ko: 샘플-홀드장치(27/04가 우선)
title.en: Sample-and-hold arrangements (G11C0027040000 takes precedence)
Shift registers

title.ko: 정확한 동작을 위한 기억장치의 체크; 스탠바이 또는 오프 라인 동작중의 기억장치의 테스트
title.en: Checking stores for correct operation; Testing stores during standby or offline operation
Detection or location of defective auxiliary circuits, e.g. defective refresh counters

title.ko: 고장난 메모리 소자의 검출 또는 그 위치의 특정
title.en: Detection or location of defective memory elements
Acceleration testing

title.ko: 기능 테스트, 예. 리프레쉬중의 테스트하는 것, 파워 온·셀프 테스트 [POST], 또는 분산 테스트
title.en: Functional testing, e.g. testing during refresh, power-on self testing [POST] or distributed testing
Test algorithms, e.g. memory scan [MScan] algorithms; Test patterns, e.g. checkerboard patterns

title.ko: 테스트를 하기 위한 내장(Built-in)장치, 예. 빌트인 셀프 테스트(BIST) [BIST]
title.en: Built-in arrangements for testing, e.g. built-in self testing [BIST]
Implementation of control logic, e.g. test mode decoders
using microprogrammed units, e.g. state machines

title.ko: 주소 작성 장치; 메모리에 액세스하기 위한 장치, 예. 주소 회로의 세부
title.en: Address generation devices; Devices for accessing memories, e.g. details of addressing circuits
using counters or linear-feedback shift registers [LFSR]
Accessing serial memories
Accessing extra cells, e.g. dummy cells or redundant cells

title.ko: 다양한 어레이에 액세스 하는 것(29/24가 우선)
title.en: Accessing multiple arrays (G11C0029240000 takes precedence)
Dependent multiple arrays, e.g. multi-bit arrays
Accessing single arrays
Serial access; Scan testing
Accessing multiple bits simultaneously
Data generation devices, e.g. data inverters
Response verification devices
using compression techniques
using error correcting codes [ECC] or parity check
Indication or identification of errors, e.g. for repair
Test trigger logic
Arrangements in static stores specially adapted for testing by means external to the store, e.g. using direct memory access [DMA] or using auxiliary access paths
Marginal testing, e.g. race, voltage or current testing
Protection of memory contents; Detection of errors in memory contents
Arrangements for designing test circuits, e.g. design for test [DFT] tools
External testing equipment for static stores, e.g. automatic test equipment [ATE]; Interfaces therefor
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
